name: Ku Punya Hati
overview: Ku Punya Hati is a 2022 Malaysian television drama series directed by Azmi Hatta, starring Nabil Aqil, Sharifah Rose and Alya Iman. This series starts its premiere on Akasia Slot, TV3 starting 4 August 2022 replacing Risik Pada Hati.

trailers.title: Ku Punya Hati | Mulai 4 Ogos, Setiap Isnin - Jumaat, 7 malam hanya di TV3
